source.purpose: The Narrator's first-turn set_location alias should merge into the Author-owned opening location instead of creating a duplicate berth.

loc_opening.name: Berth 14-Kess, a mid-tier docking arm on Ossuary Station - fuel-stained grating, one working pressure seal, flickering berth-status light overhead.
loc_opening.description: The crew's ship sits locked to the berth arm; the lien hold burns red on the docking console - nothing leaves without clearance.
atmosphericConditions: Recycled air, distant hull-knock, low amber emergency lighting.

currentLocation.name: Berth 14-Kess, a mid-tier docking arm on Ossuary Station - fuel-stained grating, one working pressure seal, flickering berth-status light overhead.
currentLocation.description: The crew's ship sits locked to the berth arm; the lien hold burns red on the docking console - nothing leaves without clearance.
atmosphericConditions: Recycled air, distant hull-knock, low amber emergency lighting.

location.name: Berth 14-Kess, a mid-tier docking arm on Ossuary Station - fuel-stained grating, one working pressure seal, flickering berth-status light overhead.
location.description: The crew's ship sits locked to the berth arm; the lien hold burns red on the docking console - nothing leaves without clearance.

narrator.prose: The red hold light bleeds across Berth 14-Kess while Voss waits by the gangway.

mechanicalEffects.name: Berth 14-Kess, Ossuary Station
mechanicalEffects.description: Mid-tier docking arm, fuel-stained grating, one working pressure seal, flickering berth-status light - your ship locked to the arm, lien hold burning red on the docking console.

established: Voss is offering a sealed-cargo run to clear a forty-thousand lien.
